body: $SPY $QQQ $NVDA $AAPL $UVXY

message.body:
Something very rare has taken place in the markets! 
 
Over the trailing 2-month period, S&P 500 has only traded below the 10-DMA on a single trading day. The last time this occurred was in late 2023 (top chart). The relentless rally in the market continued through the 1st half of 2024.  
 
Before that, 2 occurrences in 2010. Of the 3 prior occurrences, markets were higher 6, 9, and 12 months forward.  
 
$SPY $QQQ $NVDA $AAPL $UVXY

body:
$SPY $QQQ  $AAPL The Tech Reality: The moment the capital cleared borders, it created a massive surge in liquidity on the corporate balance sheet. Because Apple's  leadership chose not to over-expand real physical operations. Instead, they routed that money directly into Wall Street via unprecedented, record-breaking stock buyback programs.  
Why This Fails to Propel  the Broader Economy at the time funding required the most?  
Closed Capital Circle: Buying back its own stock simply passes billions of dollars to ultra-wealthy  who sell their shares back to the corporate treasury. 
For capital to propel the economy, it requires high velocity of money—meaning it must change hands rapidly through wages, equipment procurement, and manufacturing logistics. Financial engineering loops bypass the consumer entirely, trapping capital in secondary equity markets to artificially lift valuation metrics. The bubble is about to collapse as divergence hits critical level.

Why This Fails to Propel  the Broader Economy at the time funding required the most?  
Closed Capital Circle: Buying back its own stock simply passes billions of dollars to ultra-wealthy  who sell their shares back to the corporate treasury. 
For capital to propel the economy, it requires high velocity of money—meaning it must change hands rapidly through wages, equipment procurement, and manufacturing logistics. Financial engineering loops bypass the consumer entirely, trapping capital in secondary equity markets to artificially lift valuation metrics. The bubble is about to collapse as divergence hits critical level.

body: $SPY $QQQ $AAPL Be Responsible.. The Planned Promise vs. The Shareholder RealityThe Pitch: Apple had roughly  $252 billion stashed offshore to legally defer U.S. corporate taxes. When the repatriation tax was cut to 15%  leadership promised it would pay a massive  $40 B  one-time tax bill and funnel the remainder toward propelling the U.S. economic framework and employment.

trends.summary: The community is actively debating the volatility of the market and the efficacy of holding volatility-based instruments like UVXY amidst a backdrop of geopolitical tensions and high-profile market rallies. Traders are split between viewing these spikes as opportunities for short-term gains through tactical hedging and dismissing the symbol as a decaying instrument prone to institutional manipulation.

message.body:
I don’t envision the bull market ending, even as it serves to set a record as the month shortly turns to June. Indeed, this past week the bull market which originated in October of 2022 is now tied for the longest bull market in history not originating from a recession. Based on the trending macro-market data and forecast, it should set the record by mid-June as well.  
 
$SPY $QQQ $AAPL $NVDA $SMH

body:
$GAUZ $REFR $RACE $AAPL  
 
Grok AI; How much is the SPD roof option on the Ferrari Purosangue 
 
-The SPD (Suspended Particle Device) roof option on the Ferrari Purosangue — also called the electrochromic or photochromic panoramic glass roof — typically costs around £12,500 (about $16,000–$17,000 USD depending on exchange rates and taxes) in the UK/European market. US pricing references (from parts/option contexts) put the electrochromic panoramic roof assembly in the $16,000–$20,000+ range before installation/labor, taxes, or dealer markups 
 
Will be interesting to see more details on the Luce roof  
 
https://autos.yahoo.com/ev-and-future-tech/articles/ferrari-luce-ev-already-sold-161132649.html

message.body:
S&P 500 has achieved 19 all-time highs in 2026 to-date.  
 
The only other calendar year it stopped making more all-time highs at #19 was in 2018. There’s a 91% probability that the S&P 500 will make at least 3 more all-time highs in 2026, akin to 1991.

body:
$SPY $QQQ $NVDA $MU $AAPL 

This time everything is different?

“A tried-and-true tech selloff in just these top stocks, of the kind we’ve seen before several times after periods of these kinds of generational gains, would… well, whatever else that would do, it would throw the US economy into the recession that people have been feverishly predicting for years.”

“There are only so many trillions that can vanish from portfolios before it begins to impact economic decision making by consumers and companies alike, and derail economic growth.”

https://wolfstreet.com/2026/05/29/the-magnitude-of-the-numbers-is-just-mindboggling-12-companies-30-trillion/

data.title: The Magnitude of the Numbers Is just Mindboggling: 12 U.S. Companies, $30 Trillion
data.description: Trillions of dollars fly by so fast they're hard to see. By now, 11 US companies have a market value of $1 trillion or more. Combined, they have a market cap of $29 trillion. Walmart [WMT] was already in the $1 trillion club for a few weeks, if barely, but recently fell off the wagon.

body: $AAPL 290 next week

What's up with $AAPL today

Stock's flat but there's some serious call action going on

Over the last five sessions, call flow has been super heavy, especially in those near and moderately OTM strikes

Saw a big burst of Aug 21 $345 calls getting snapped up, $15M in ask-side sweeps on InsiderFinance

Institutions could be gearing up for a push toward the mid-$340s by late summer

Might be worth watching if this starts to lift in the next few sessions

Could be a leading indicator

Keep an eye on those levels before jumping in with new longs

today

Stock's flat but there's some serious call action going on
